message:
🌱 knative-eventing: ApiServerSource should be able to watch resources in other namespaces besides (#1912)

* 🌱 Add knative-eventing: ApiServerSource should be able to watch resources in other mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add knative-eventing: ApiServerSource should be able to watch resources in other mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix knative-eventing ApiServerSource mission: remove wrong PR, fix resolution

- Remove incorrect PR #6219 (Wathola tracing) from sourceUrls
- Replace Zipkin/Jaeger tracing resolution with correct namespaceSelector description
- Update steps to describe configuring namespaceSelector for cross-namespace watching

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "knative-eventing-4481-apiserversource-should-be-able-to-watch-resources-in-other",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "knative-eventing: ApiServerSource should be able to watch resources in other namespaces besides the one in which it resides",
+    "description": "ApiServerSource should be able to watch resources in other namespaces besides the one in which it resides. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current knative-eventing deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your knative-eventing version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nhelm list -n knative-eventing 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working knative-eventing installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review knative-eventing configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant knative-eventing configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nkubectl get configmap -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative-eventing\n```\n**Problem**\ncurrently apiserversource can only watch resources within the namespace in which it was created."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Configure ApiServerSource with namespaceSelector",
+        "description": "Create or update your ApiServerSource to watch resources across namespaces using the `namespaceSelector` field:\n```yaml\napiVersion: sources.knative.dev/v1\nkind: ApiServerSource\nmetadata:\n  name: my-apiserversource\n  namespace: default\nspec:\n  serviceAccountName: my-sa\n  mode: Resource\n  resources:\n    - apiVersion: v1\n      kind: Event\n  namespaceSelector:\n    matchLabels:\n      watch-events: \"true\"\n  sink:\n    ref:\n      apiVersion: serving.knative.dev/v1\n      kind: Service\n      name: event-display\n```\nThe `namespaceSelector` field accepts standard Kubernetes label selectors, allowing the ApiServerSource to watch resources in all namespaces matching the specified labels."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nkubectl get events -n knative-eventing --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"ApiServerSource should be able to watch resources in other\u2026\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "ApiServerSource now supports watching resources across namespaces via the `namespaceSelector` field in the spec. This allows a single ApiServerSource to watch resources in namespaces matching label selectors, eliminating the need for one ApiServerSource per namespace.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "knative-eventing",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "knative-eventing"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/knative/eventing/issues/4481",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/knative/eventing"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 19,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with knative-eventing installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-02T06:30:29.355Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
